title: Prompt-to-Paper: Agentic AI System for Bioinformatics
summary: Prompt-to-Paper: Agentic AI System for Bioinformatics
whyItMatters: While recent advances in large language models have enabled end-to-end automated manuscript generation, existing systems suffer from three critical deficiencies: (i) generated claims are not deterministically grounded in verifiable literature, (ii) experimental results are frequently fabricated rather than executed, and (iii) there exists no standardized, m…
